Weapon Runner

Navigate through interconnected platforming stages as a powerful agent equipped with an arsenal of upgradable weapons. Collect triangular EXP to level up your weapons from 1 to 3, each level improving damage and firing patterns. Beware: taking damage spills EXP and can de-level your weapons! Master precision movement including variable jumps, weapon recoil, water physics, and environmental hazards. Find Life Capsules to increase max HP, discover mobility upgrades like the Booster jetpack, and defeat the multi-phase boss to win. Save stations restore health and save progress. Strategic weapon swapping and resource management are key to victory.

Arrow Keys: Move left/right, look up/down | Space: Jump (hold for higher jumps) | Z: Shoot current weapon | Shift: Cycle weapons | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart (from game over)

Weapon Runner

Navigate through interconnected platforming stages as a powerful agent equipped with an arsenal of upgradable weapons. Collect triangular EXP to level up your weapons from 1 to 3, each level improving damage and firing patterns. Beware: taking damage spills EXP and can de-level your weapons! Master precision movement including variable jumps, weapon recoil, water physics, and environmental hazards. Find Life Capsules to increase max HP, discover mobility upgrades like the Booster jetpack, and defeat the multi-phase boss to win. Save stations restore health and save progress. Strategic weapon swapping and resource management are key to victory.

Arrow Keys: Move left/right, look up/down | Space: Jump (hold for higher jumps) | Z: Shoot current weapon | Shift: Cycle weapons | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart (from game over)
